Container:
dns-monitoring
bridge
bash false https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring DNS Monitoring WebApp - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics. Multi-service deployment with nginx, backend API, and frontend UI. Network http://[IP]:[PORT:3000] https://raw.githubusercontent.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring/main/dns-monitoring-unraid-compose-template.xml https://raw.githubusercontent.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring/main/icon.png
# 1. Clone the repository cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring git clone https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring.git . 2>/dev/null || git -C . pull
# 2. Create required directories mkdir -p /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data
# 3. Set proper permissions chmod 755 /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data
# 4. Start with docker-compose (production config) docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml up -d
# 5. Wait for services to be healthy sleep 5 docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml ps
cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down cd /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring && docker-compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml down -v && rm -rf .
unless-stopped
bridge
3000 80 tcp
/mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring rw
DNS Monitoring - Self-hosted DNS query monitoring and analytics web application.
This template uses docker-compose to build from source on your Unraid system.
Installation: 1. Add this container via template 2. The RunCmd will automatically: - Clone the GitHub repository to /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring - Build the Docker image - Start the container
Features: - Real-time DNS query monitoring and logging - React-based web dashboard - Express.js REST API - SQLite database for persistent storage - Query analytics and reporting - Configurable DNS servers
Access: - Web UI: http://[IP]:3000 - All services start automatically
Data: - Database: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring/data/dns-monitoring.db - Project files: /mnt/user/appdata/dns-monitoring
GitHub: https://github.com/freemen810/dns-monitoring
